Camera is busy.
Close other tabs/apps using the camera and restart.

multiplayer.title: MULTIPLAYER
multiplayer.subtitle: Create a private room or join with a code.
multiplayer.createBody: You will get a code, secure link and QR for other players.
multiplayer.joinBody: Enter the six-character code shown by the host.
multiplayer.connectionError: Could not connect to the room.
multiplayer.invalidCode: The room code must contain six valid characters.
multiplayer.invalidResponse: The server returned an invalid response.
multiplayer.chooseMap: CHOOSE A MAP FOR THE ROOM
multiplayer.hostControlsRules: These settings are controlled by the host.
multiplayer.prepareFailed: Could not prepare the map for play.
multiplayer.readyHint: Changing the map resets every player's ready state.
multiplayer.mapsError: Could not load the map list.

errors.ROOM_NOT_FOUND: Room not found. Check the code and make sure the room has not expired.
errors.INVALID_ROOM_TOKEN: The room link or token is invalid.
errors.HOST_ALREADY_CONNECTED: The host is already connected to the room.
errors.PLAYER_NOT_FOUND: The player does not belong to this room.
errors.HOST_ONLY: Only the host can perform this operation.
errors.INVALID_MODE: The selected game mode is invalid.
errors.INVALID_RULES: The selected gameplay rules are invalid.
errors.INVALID_SCORE: The server rejected an invalid score.
errors.ROUND_REQUIRED: You are not participating in an active round.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
errors.INVALID_MESSAGE: The server received an invalid message.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOL: This game version is incompatible with the server.
errors.ALREADY_JOINED: This connection has already joined a room.
errors.UNKNOWN_MESSAGE: The server did not recognize the message.
errors.SERVER_UNAVAILABLE: The room server is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
errors.REQUEST_FAILED: Could not complete the room operation.

help.title: HOW TO PLAY
help.subtitle: A quick guide to Hand Sabers

controls.title: Controls
controls.body: Stand in front of the camera and cut blocks with the matching saber. Escape pauses the game.

scoring.title: Scoring
scoring.body: Cut near the center and on beat. Correct direction and longer combos increase your score.

camera.title: Camera
camera.body: Place the camera at chest height, light yourself from the front, and keep your full arms visible.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.body: If sides are reversed, enable camera flipping. If sound is delayed, adjust the audio offset.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.body: Stand about 1–1.5 m from the camera. Complete all four calibration steps to match the play area and hand sides.

movement.title: Saber movement
movement.body: Move your full forearms. Keep both hands in frame and guide each blade through the center of incoming blocks.

hit.title: Hit on beat
hit.body: Cut each block with the matching saber and follow its arrow. Better timing and center accuracy earn more points.

performance.title: Performance
performance.autoHint: Automatically checks hardware and adjusts quality during gameplay.

developer.name: Developer mode
developer.desc: Shows diagnostic panel, rendering metrics, VRAM, tracking and camera preview

gameplay.noFailDesc: Game doesn't end at zero HP
gameplay.noteSpeedDesc: Changes approach time without moving beats
gameplay.flipCameraDesc: Enable when left saber hits right track
gameplay.saberColorsDesc: Choose color separately for each saber

maps.title: HAND SABERS
maps.subtitle: MAP LIBRARY
maps.serverFallback: Server not responding — showing local maps.

creator.title: MAP CREATOR
creator.noAudioWarning: Map loaded without audio — drag an audio file or ZIP.
creator.savedLocal: Server unavailable — JSON downloaded as backup
creator.exportNoAudioConfirm: No audio in memory. Export ZIP with map.json only?
creator.autosaveFoundConfirm: Autosave found for this map. Load it?
creator.kbSearchPlaceholder: Filter by action, group, or key…

remoteTracking.phoneIntro: Connect your phone to the game. Camera images remain on this device.
remoteTracking.hostIntro: Create a short session and scan the QR with your phone.
remoteTracking.scanQr: SCAN THE QR WITH YOUR PHONE
remoteTracking.hostPrivacy: Session tokens are not saved. You can close this window — the connection remains active during play.
remoteTracking.settingsHint: Phone pairing is experimental. Camera images stay on the phone; the computer receives tracking data only.
remoteTracking.sourceCameraHint: Calibration will always use the camera connected to this computer.
remoteTracking.sourcePhoneReady: The phone is connected and will be used during calibration.
remoteTracking.sourcePhoneMissing: Connect the phone before starting calibration.
remoteTracking.sourceAutoPhone: The phone is connected and will be selected automatically.
remoteTracking.sourceAutoCamera: No phone is connected, so the PC camera will be used automatically.
remoteTracking.phoneRequired: Phone tracking is selected, but the phone is not connected.
remoteTracking.waitingCredential: SCAN THE QR OR ENTER THE CODE
remoteTracking.sessionExpired: The pairing session has expired. Create a new session and reconnect the phone.
remoteTracking.cameraNext: Start the camera to begin local hand tracking.
remoteTracking.trackingActive: TRACKING ACTIVE — DATA IS BEING SENT
remoteTracking.cameraFailed: Could not start the camera or tracking model. Check permissions and the secure HTTPS connection.
remoteTracking.preparingPhoneDataDetail: The computer camera will remain off
remoteTracking.privacy: Only hand coordinates will be sent to the computer — never camera images.
remoteTracking.invalidCode: The code must contain six valid characters.
remoteTracking.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.
remoteTracking.sessionNotFound: No active session was found. Create a new one on the computer.
remoteTracking.createFailed: Failed to create a pairing session.
remoteTracking.statusFailed: Failed to refresh the session status.

overlay.prepareCamera: Prepare your camera and good lighting.
